name: Efficient Scientific Discovery
description: Evaluate whether agents can identify hidden scientific laws by selecting informative experiments under budget and observation noise.

binding_vow.description: The agent plays a scientist in a constrained lab. It must run noisy experiments with different precision-cost tradeoffs and then submit the hidden law family before step or budget limits force truncation.

observation_space.description: JSON state with budget, history of experiments, valid law families, and expected action schema.

reward.description: Experiment actions incur negative cost. Submit reward depends on correctness, confidence calibration, remaining budget, and early-submit evidence penalties.
